evals.prompt: Create a new badge component CSS file at cli/ui/components/badge.css for the do-wdr design system
evals.expected_output: A single CSS file with BEM classes using the do-wdr- prefix, semantic tokens, size variants, and accessibility features.
assertions: Uses BEM naming with do-wdr- prefix (e.g., .do-wdr-badge)
Defines custom properties in :root block using semantic tokens

evals.prompt: Audit the CSS file cli/ui/components/button.css for correct BEM naming conventions
evals.expected_output: Report on whether the component follows BEM naming: .do-wdr-{component} base, .do-wdr-{component}--variant modifiers, .do-wdr-{component}__element sub-elements.
assertions: Checks for modifier classes using double-dash (--)
Checks for element classes using double-underscore (__)
